metadata.title: AI Image Generator
metadata.description: Generate images with AI models, support text-to-image and image-to-image.

page.title: AI Image Generator
page.description: Generate images with AI models, support text-to-image and image-to-image.

generator.title: Image Generator
generator.description: Generate images with AI models, support text-to-image and image-to-image.

form.model_hint: Nano Banana: faster, better value, supports Google Search. Nano Banana Pro: higher quality and detail for production.
form.prompt_placeholder: Describe the details of the image, such as color, shape, texture, etc.
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload reference images, support multiple images
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Some images failed to upload, please delete them and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content

gpt_image_2.title: GPT Image 2 Generator
gpt_image_2.description: Create images from text prompts or up to four reference images.
gpt_image_2.provider_not_configured: Please contact the administrator to configure KIE.
gpt_image_2.credit_fallback: This generation needs {credits} credits. Please add credits to continue.
gpt_image_2.result_hint: Your GPT Image 2 result will appear here when generation completes.

image_model_switcher.title: Choose image model
image_model_switcher.gpt_image_2_description: Best for clean prompt-to-image and reference-guided creation.
image_model_switcher.nano_banana_description: Best for advanced options such as resolution, format, and Google Search.

queue.title: High Demand Right Now
queue.description: Free users are currently queued. Members can start immediately and get priority rendering.
queue.submit_failed: We couldn't start your generation just now. You can retry without losing your place.
queue.membership_checking: Checking membership status. Please try again in a moment.

credit_fallback.title: Current mode needs more credits
credit_fallback.description: This generation needs {requested} credits, while your balance is {remaining}. You can switch to a lower-cost mode and keep creating, or add more credits to stay on the current mode.
credit_fallback.invite_description: Earn {credits} credits for each friend who signs up.
credit_fallback.image_standard_description: Lower-cost image mode for quick creation.
